message:
Improve preview comment styling

Use a compact single-line format with status indicators:
- Live: 📦 **Preview** · [View →](url) · 🟢 Live
- Removed: 📦 ~~**Preview**~~ · ~~[View →](url)~~ · ⚪ Removed

Use HTML comment marker for reliable comment detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
